questions.q: While stalking a rare antelope, a 75-year-old millionaire trophy hunter was recently trampled to death by a herd of elephants in which African country?
On April 24, 2026, Nvidia's stock closed at a record high, pushing its market capitalization past what major milestone?
Which major tech company saw its stock soar 23.6% on April 24, 2026, marking its best single-day performance since 1987 following a blowout profit report?
Lori Chavez-DeRemer resigned in late April 2026 as the head of which U.S. government department amid an investigation into her travel and spending practices?
A late April 2026 report highlighted growing concerns of an AI-driven labor crisis following a combined 20,000 job cuts at which two tech giants?
A 2026 Norwegian study using machine learning to analyze anti-Muslim hate speech online found that most hateful posts come from:
options: A small group of users who don't remain active for long
Automated foreign bots that post continuously
A widespread number of casual social media users
Verified accounts with large follower bases
questions.correctText: A small group of users who don't remain active for long

questions.q: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu recently confirmed he successfully underwent treatment for an early-stage tumor of what type of cancer?
In a bid to push production into the United States, the Trump administration offered immediate tariff relief to aluminum and steel companies from which country if they relocate?
According to a study featured in the news on April 25, 2026, what ongoing problem do many introductory psychology textbooks have?
options: They misrepresent scientific findings and repeat long-standing myths
They are too advanced for college freshmen
They focus exclusively on modern neurobiology
questions.correctText: They misrepresent scientific findings and repeat long-standing myths

questions.q: Which UK-based retailer announced the closure of all its U.S. showrooms on April 24, 2026, after initially entering the American market in 2020?
